metadata.name: Maker Chip PCB - V3
metadata.author: Kevin Fehr
metadata.description: A poker chip sized PCB device with 3 stacked layers (2x 0.8mm + 1x 2mm middle). Features 4 white LEDs for internal glow effect, powered via pogo pin interface. Middle layer contains 15mm magnets and component cutouts.

part.compatibility_notes: Compatible with standard 0603 SMD footprints. Requires reflow soldering or careful hand soldering with temperature-controlled iron.
part.description: 0603 SMD White LED indicator with 2.6V-3.6V forward voltage, suitable for PCB indicator and glow applications. Wide viewing angle ideal for internal illumination effects.

interfaces.description: Power interface for LED. Requires current-limiting resistor in series.
interfaces.name: LED Power Interface

functions.description: LED anode - connect to positive supply through resistor
functions.name: VCC

part.usage_notes: Always use a current-limiting resistor in series. For 5V supply, use 120Ω resistor for ~15mA current. LED forward voltage varies with color; white LEDs typically 3.0-3.2V.
warnings: Exceeding maximum forward current (25mA) will damage the LED
Reverse voltage exceeding 5V may cause permanent damage
Always include current-limiting resistor to prevent burnout

part.compatibility_notes: Compatible with standard 0603 SMD footprints. E24 series standard value.
part.description: 0603 SMD thick film resistor, 120Ω resistance, 100mW power rating. Suitable for LED current limiting and general-purpose applications.

interfaces.description: Bidirectional resistor terminals for current limiting
interfaces.name: Resistor Terminals

part.usage_notes: For LED current limiting: R = (V_supply - V_LED) / I_LED. Example: With 5V supply and 3.2V white LED at 15mA, use R = (5-3.2)/0.015 = 120Ω.
warnings: Ensure power dissipation stays within 100mW rating
P = I²R - for 15mA through 120Ω, dissipation is 27mW (safe)

metadata.name: Pogo Pin Power Interface
metadata.description: Two-pad pogo pin interface for 5V DC power supply. Exposed copper pads on bottom PCB for spring-loaded pogo pin contact. Provides VCC (5V) and GND connections.

functions.name: VCC_5V
functions.description: 5V DC power supply from pogo pin contact

functions.name: GND
functions.description: Ground reference from pogo pin contact

interfaces.name: Power Output Interface
interfaces.description: 5V DC power output via pogo pin spring-loaded contacts

functions.name: CONTACT_VCC
functions.description: Exposed copper pad for pogo pin contact

functions.name: CONTACT_GND
functions.description: Exposed copper pad for pogo pin contact

interfaces.name: Pogo Pin Contact Interface
interfaces.description: Flat copper pads for pogo pin spring-loaded contact. Must remain exposed on bottom PCB surface.

part.usage_notes: Pogo pin pads should be 1.5-2mm diameter minimum for reliable contact. Gold plating recommended for better contact. Place on bottom PCB with no solder mask over pads.
part.compatibility_notes: Compatible with standard spring-loaded pogo pins (1A-3A current rating typical). Ensure mating pogo pins have sufficient spring force (typically 20-50g per pin).
warnings: Do not cover pads with solder mask - must remain exposed copper
Ensure bottom PCB surface remains flat - no components on this side
Pogo pin diameter typically 0.8-1.5mm - design pads accordingly

metadata.name: 8-Pad Standard Interface
metadata.description: Standardized 8-pad pogo pin interface for Maker Chip ecosystem. Provides power, ground, data, clock, and 4 general-purpose I/O lines. Each pad is 3mm diameter exposed copper for pogo pin contact.

8 × 3mm diameter pads for pogo pin spring-loaded contact. Must remain exposed on bottom PCB surface - no solder mask.
interfaces.name: Pogo Pin Contact Interface

part.usage_notes: All 8 pads are 3mm diameter exposed copper. Standard pad layout enables interoperability across Maker Chip ecosystem. Place on bottom PCB surface with no solder mask over pads.
part.compatibility_notes: Compatible with standard spring-loaded pogo pins (1A-3A current rating typical). Ensure mating interface follows the 8-pad standard layout for proper connectivity.
warnings: Do not cover pads with solder mask - must remain exposed copper
Place on bottom PCB surface only
Ensure mating pogo pins align with pad positions
Standard interface enables chip swapping and ecosystem compatibility

metadata.description: 8-bit AVR microcontroller in SOP-8. Controls 4 LEDs individually via GPIO. ISP programmable via pads 3-6.
metadata.name: ATtiny85 MCU

interfaces.name: MCU Power
interfaces.description: Power supply for ATtiny85 (VCC + GND)
PB0/MOSI/SDA - Primary data line
interfaces.name: DATA Interface

interfaces.description: PB2/SCK/SCL - Clock line
interfaces.name: CLK Interface
RESET Interface
interfaces.description: Pin 1 - Active-low reset / chip select

interfaces.name: MISO Interface
interfaces.description: PB1/MISO - Data output for ISP

interfaces.name: GPIO/PWM Interface
interfaces.description: PB4 - PWM output / GPIO

interfaces.name: ANALOG Interface
interfaces.description: PB3/ADC3 - Analog input / GPIO
PB0 drives LED 1 anode (shared with DATA pad)
interfaces.name: LED 1 Drive

interfaces.description: PB1 drives LED 2 anode (shared with MISO pad)
interfaces.name: LED 2 Drive
LED 3 Drive
interfaces.description: PB3 drives LED 3 anode (shared with ANALOG pad)
PB4 drives LED 4 anode (shared with GPIO/PWM pad)
interfaces.name: LED 4 Drive

part.usage_notes: Each GPIO pin (PB0, PB1, PB3, PB4) individually drives an LED. Pins are shared with external pads for ISP programming. GPIO output ~4.2-4.8V at 5V VCC, so LED current through 120ohm resistor will be ~8-13mA (still bright).

requirements.content: Supply 5V DC power through pogo pin interface to illuminate 4 white LEDs
Each LED must have a current-limiting resistor to prevent burnout
LEDs must fit within cutouts in middle PCB layer (0603 package: 1.6×0.8×0.55mm)
Bottom surface must be flat with only exposed copper pads for pogo pins
Top surface must be flat for silkscreen design application
8-Pad Standard Interface: VCC, GND, DATA, CLK, CS/RST, MISO/GPIO, GPIO/PWM, ANALOG - all 3mm exposed copper pads
ATtiny85 MCU connected to pads 3-8 for ISP programming and LED pulse control

tasks.title: Finalize LED and resistor component selection from LCSC
tasks.description: Select 0603 white LEDs (NCD0603W3) and 120Ω current-limiting resistors

tasks.title: Design LED circuit schematic
tasks.description: Create circuit diagram with 4 parallel LED strings, each with series resistor

tasks.title: Define pogo pin pad layout on bottom PCB
tasks.description: Design 2-pad layout: VCC (5V) and GND. Consider pad size for reliable pogo contact.

tasks.title: Create middle layer cutout pattern
tasks.description: Design cutouts for 4 LEDs, 4 resistors, and 2 magnets. Verify component fit.

tasks.title: Route traces on bottom PCB
tasks.description: Connect pogo pin pads to component positions through vias to top PCB

tasks.title: Design top PCB silkscreen artwork
tasks.description: Create logo/design with cutout for LED glow effect

tasks.title: Generate Gerber files for fabrication
tasks.description: Export manufacturing files for all 3 PCB layers

tasks.title: Order components from LCSC
tasks.description: Order 4+ white LEDs (NCD0603W3) and 4+ 120Ω resistors. Order extras for spares.

plan.notes:
## Stack Structure
- **Top PCB (0.8mm)**: Silkscreen design on top, LEDs/resistors on bottom
- **Middle PCB (2mm)**: Cutouts for LEDs, resistors, ATtiny85, and magnets; two 15mm x 2mm magnets with opposite polarities
- **Bottom PCB (0.8mm)**: 8x 3mm copper pads for pogo pins on bottom, traces and optional components on top

## 8-Pad Standard Interface
| Pad | Signal | ATtiny85 Pin |
|-----|--------|--------------|
| 1 | VCC (5V) | Pin 8 |
| 2 | GND | Pin 4 |
| 3 | DATA (MOSI/SDA) | Pin 5 (PB0) |
| 4 | CLK (SCK/SCL) | Pin 7 (PB2) |
| 5 | CS/RST | Pin 1 (RESET) |
| 6 | MISO/GPIO | Pin 6 (PB1) |
| 7 | GPIO/PWM | Pin 3 (PB4) |
| 8 | ANALOG | Pin 2 (PB3/ADC3) |

## Electrical Specs
- Supply Voltage: 5V DC via pogo pins
- LED Configuration: 4x White LEDs in parallel, each with 120ohm resistor
- Total Current: ~60mA (4 x 15mA)
- ATtiny85 for V2 pulse effects via PWM on PB4

## LCSC Part Numbers
- White LED: NCD0603W3 (C158100)
- 120ohm Resistor: RC0603FR-07120RL (C114640)
- ATtiny85: ATtiny85-20SU (C89852)
